name: grosharp/process-steps
title: Grosharp Process Steps
description: A structured process section with up to 4 editable steps.

heading.default: A focused workflow from brief to results

text.default: Every engagement follows a clear, repeatable process that keeps you informed and confident at every milestone.

default.title: Discover
default.text: Deep-dive sessions to understand your business, audience, and goals. We eliminate assumptions and ground every decision in real insight.

default.title: Strategy
default.text: We craft a focused blueprint — information architecture, design direction, content hierarchy, and a marketing foundation tailored to your goals.

default.title: Design & Build
default.text: Design and development in short feedback cycles, sharing progress early and often. Quality assurance runs in parallel, not at the end.

default.title: Launch & Grow
default.text: Deploy, measure, and scale. We handle launch, performance checks, and analytics — then stay close to push growth forward.
